summary: Ultrasound enhances the accuracy and safety of internal jugular vein cannulation by enabling real-time assessment of vascular anatomy and confirming successful placement while reducing risk of arterial puncture. The consistent findings across multiple studies support its use as an effective tool during venous catheter insertion.
